text.title: product-launch Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for product-launch as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Planning starts the week before launch day.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: One week is not enough to build a pre-launch audience, create and review assets, coordinate partners, or set up monitoring. Minimum: 6 weeks for a meaningful launch, 8 weeks for a high-impact one.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Friday launches lose the Monday-Tuesday news cycle. Most journalists and influencers are not covering tech news Friday afternoon. Tuesday-Wednesday gives the full week's coverage window.

failure-mode.description: Same message posted verbatim to every channel.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Twitter audiences, email subscribers, and LinkedIn followers have different contexts and norms. Copy-pasting produces content that feels wrong in each channel and reduces engagement in all of them.

failure-mode.description: No pre-launch audience — the product is announced to a cold start.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Without an email list, waitlist, or community following, Day 1 signups depend entirely on algorithm and press pickup — both unreliable. Building even 500 subscribers before launch transforms the baseline metric.

failure-mode.description: No monitoring on launch day — the team is focused on announcements, not product health.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Launch day is peak load and peak visibility for bugs. Server errors and broken flows during the announcement window permanently affect conversion. Assign a dedicated on-call engineer before posting anything.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Launch learnings are the highest-value data point for the next launch. What channel outperformed, which asset under-converted, what the team would change — all disappear if not captured within 2 weeks.
